name: Tuna Chili Texas-Style
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Red or green bell pepper, diced
1 can Whole Tomatoes with Juice (28 oz), chopped
1 can Tuna (6-1/2 oz), drained and flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart microwavable bowl or casserole dish, combine diced bell pepper, onion, celery, garlic, and water.
2. Cover with waxed paper; microwave on High for 4-5 minutes or until vegetables are nearly tender.
3. Stir in remaining ingredients except hot pepper sauce.
4. Cover; microwave on High for 15-17 minutes, stirring every 3 minutes to allow flavors to blend.
5. Season to taste with hot pepper sauce. Makes 4 servings.
6. Preparation time: 10 minutes. Calories: 206 per serving.
